## Privacy Check

Please confirm:

- [ ] No customer data.
- [ ] No source code.
- [ ] No device identifiers.
- [ ] No production logs.
- [ ] No keys, tokens, credentials, or authentication material.
- [ ] No exact production topology or private facility names.
